samples.description: Site-specific post order update for visitor ID handling.

payload.input_text: For Sierra Ridge, overnight guards must verify a physical photo ID for all after-hours visitors before granting access. If the visitor only has a photo of an ID, call the resident before entry and note the exception in the log.

samples.description: Incident note requiring follow-up and QA review.

payload.input_text: At Harbor Point on 2026-05-14 around 07:45, the east gate arm stayed open after a vendor truck exited. Patrol secured the gate manually and notified maintenance. Need follow-up to confirm the gate controller is repaired.
Create an n8n workflow later that accepts a webhook from the operations form, classifies the note, writes a Markdown file to the vault, and commits it to GitHub.
